{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230310418F7E67B0724B4417B64A"}"},"total":1446},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7236328775527547663","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看！就喜欢作者的思想意识，穿越过去有能力有背景，又是个正常的男人又没有法律束缚。女方又不反对多娶几个才对。像有些书穿过去就是当太监的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1684839137,"group_id":"7207256920594320384","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nxlp9k4ZZT1LdqswRiS+bbb1TOSMawad+ipY0YsGTxi8","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790605&x-signature=YlzhmTSXCiJ8jjqgO%2BoHwuKOIgo%3D","user_id":"2805590762990157","user_name":"光和尚爱洗头"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2805590762990157","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7207256920594320384","book_info":{"abstract":"(九叔+雷法+僵尸+女鬼+港综诡异大融合+别问主角喜不喜欢女人，他喜欢很多女人，简介无力，看看正文)
我叫林海，于五星连珠之际穿越灵异世界，在一个星光璀璨的乱葬岗被九叔捡到，而这也开启了我雷法荡妖魔的一生。。。。(以上是简介，能写多少，就看作者会不会被饿死了)","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/183ce0adf9f86574b5724e5794661e24","author":"吞粥之鱼","author_id":"","book_id":"7207256920594320384","book_name":"九叔世界之雷法无敌","book_short_name":"星光照耀诸天","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":383,"name":"九叔","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=383&name=九叔&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7207257108625293885","read_count":"37285","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"4836012"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"2199","tags":"男频衍生,九叔,穿越,同人,衍生,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/fe9095aec45a80cbd3bcd9ba3401269c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779390641&x-signature=quEHFEverOZZXjttyQnRwgwv8Ek%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"110190069405","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"36711"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230310418F7E67B0724B4417B64A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_tex
